{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MkxgdkyaGRfqZaJQnQ4C1d","type":"tool_result","content":"{\"number\": 51810, \"title\": \"[Bug]: Doctor/update fails when Telegram bot token uses file-based SecretRef (2026.3 regression)\", \"body\": \"### Bug type\\n\\nRegression (worked before, now fails)\\n\\n### Summary\\n\\n\\n### Summary\\nOn macOS, after updating to OpenClaw 2026.3.13, `openclaw update` and `openclaw doctor` now fail whenever `channels.telegram.botToken` is stored via a file-based SecretRef (`file:filemain:/channels/telegram/botToken`). The gateway itself works, but the stricter post-update doctor can\\u2019t resolve the SecretRef outside the live gateway runtime, so Control UI + CLI runs all error out.\\n\\n### Environment\\n- macOS (local install)\\n- OpenClaw 2026.3.13 (61d171a)\\n- Telegram bot token stored in `~/.openclaw/secrets.json` via:\\n```json\\n&#34;channels&#34;: {\\n&#34;telegram&#3","is_error":false}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"36fa4fe9-64fc-49e4-a043-91872139c1d6","uuid":"db5dd801-00d8-42ce-9cd5-392be1babd8b","timestamp":"2026-03-21T18:34:26.086Z","tool_use_result":{"stdout":"{\"number\": 51810, \"title\": \"[Bug]: Doctor/update fails when Telegram bot token uses file-based SecretRef (2026.3 regression)\", \"body\": \"### Bug type\\n\\nRegression (worked before, now fails)\\n\\n### Summary\\n\\n\\n### Summary\\nOn macOS, after updating to OpenClaw 2026.3.13, `openclaw update` and `openclaw doctor` now fail whenever `channels.telegram.botToken` is stored via a file-based SecretRef (`file:filemain:/channels/telegram/botToken`). The gateway itself works, but the stricter post-update doctor can\\u2019t resolve the SecretRef outside the live gateway runtime, so Control UI + CLI runs all error out.\\n\\n### Environment\\n- macOS (local install)\\n- OpenClaw 2026.3.13 (61d171a)\\n- Telegram bot token stored in `~/.openclaw/secrets.json` via:\\n```json\\n&#34;channels&#34;: {\\n&#34;telegram&#3","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false}}
